items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding user input sanitization.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate that all user input is sanitized or escaped, but the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from the simulation of this scenario. Without concrete traces or snapshots demonstrating the sanitization process or its effectiveness, it is impossible to confirm whether the requirement is met. Therefore, the assessment is inconclusive due to a lack of supporting evidence.
